name: Creamy Broccoli Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lasagna noodles according to package instructions until desired doneness.
2. Drain and rinse the cooked noodles with hot water.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Melt margarine in a 4-quart saucepan over medium heat.
5. Add onion and cook until tender, stirring occasionally.
6. Stir in flour, bouillon, garlic salt, and pepper. Cook for 2-3 minutes until the mixture is smooth and bubbly.
7. Gradually add milk to the saucepan while continuously stirring. Cook until the mixture boils and thickens.
8. Stir in cottage cheese, broccoli, and mushrooms. Mix well.
9. In an ungreased 13 x 9 x 2 baking dish, layer 1/3 of the noodles, 1/3 of the sauce (about 2 cups), 1/3 of the Swiss cheese; repeat layers twice.
10. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25-35 minutes or until thoroughly heated. Let stand for 15 minutes before serving.
